name: @rhombus-std/di.examples.without-transformer
description: Runnable @rhombus-std/di example wired by hand — explicit tokens + manual metadata, no transformer.

scripts.test: bun run build && node dist/di.examples.without-transformer/src/main.js > /tmp/rhombus-std-without-transformer.out && diff -u expected.txt /tmp/rhombus-std-without-transformer.out
